item.title: BenColeyGolf: Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 4h This cannot be real. Cita David Rumsey @_DavidRumsey · 10h Here is the full email LIV Golf
item.description: Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 4h This cannot be real. Cita David Rumsey @_DavidRumsey · 10h Here is the full email LIV Golf CEO Scott O'Neil sent to league staffers this afternoon, obtained by @FOS. 25 2 62 37 mil

item.title:
NoLayingUp: No Laying Up @NoLayingUp · 6h Full emergency pod available now.
Thanks to @JoelMBeall for hopping on to talk about L
item.description:
No Laying Up @NoLayingUp · 6h Full emergency pod available now.
Thanks to @JoelMBeall for hopping on to talk about LIV and what the future of the league might look like. open.spotify.com 1147: What is going on with LIV Golf? No Laying Up - Golf Podcast · Episode 4 3 60 20 mil

item.title: Mike_kim714: Michael S. Kim @Mike_kim714 · 13h I was getting ready to hit my tee shot on 18 with my 3 wd and noticed a decent sized c
item.description:
Michael S. Kim @Mike_kim714 · 13h I was getting ready to hit my tee shot on 18 with my 3 wd and noticed a decent sized crack on the face
All the trucks are gone so the rep is trying to get it shipped overnight.
My head pro from home is also shipping my back up from my locker.
For now, I stole Max Homa’s Mostrar más 172 41 4 mil 453 mil

item.title: Mike_kim714: Michael S. Kim @Mike_kim714 · 8h En respuesta a @Mike_kim714 Also shoutout to tour players. Many offered their back up
item.description: Michael S. Kim @Mike_kim714 · 8h En respuesta a @Mike_kim714 Also shoutout to tour players. Many offered their back up 3wd for me to try. One even got my number thru someone else to reach out and tell them to try their back up. We’re competing with one another but at the same time want to help out whenever possible. 24 11 1 mil 32 mil

item.title:
NUCLRGOLF: NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 8h “Walking is so much more enjoyable than riding.”
Do you agree? 126 18 285 56 mil
item.description:
